name: Lemon Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar thoroughly until combined.
2. Add the eggs and mix well after combining the butter and sugar.
3. Gradually add the water, lemon juice, and grated lemon rind to the mixture.
4. Cook over a double boiler until thickened.
Source: Pennsylvania Dutch Cook Book - Fine Old Recipes, Culinary Arts Press, 1936.
